trigger_condition: task_type == file_write AND output_format == json AND target_consumer != dotnet
boundary_conditions: PowerShell Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 produces BOM; use json.dump instead

trigger_condition: task_type == plugin_deploy OR task_type == plugin_debug AND ui_not_visible

trigger_condition: shell_type == powershell AND (op == file_write OR op == deploy) AND file_extension IN [.py, .json, .ps1]
boundary_conditions: EF BB BF 即 UTF-8 BOM; Python 3 可处理但 C++/Rust/JS 解析器失败

trigger_condition: 'non_ascii' in context or 'encoding' in context and 'utf8' not in context
boundary_conditions: 第三方库不受此检查限制

简单(cat/grep/ls/git) → shell优先
中等(npm/browser/simple_compute) → js优先
复杂(json_merge/batch/regex/跨文件) → Python优先
总拥有成本(TCO)优先于首轮速度
PreReply钩子触发时匹配 task_type=user_prompt
引擎回复display_line=[DGEN] 通过, 通过钩子statusMessage显示

trigger_condition: shell_type == powershell AND op == file_write AND method == Set-Content
action: block; use [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText() instead of Set-Content to avoid UTF-8 BOM

trigger_condition: 'hooks.json' in context or 'config.toml' in context or 'trusted_hash' in context

与 hooks.json 无关的 JSON 操作不受影响

trigger_condition: '\\diegin_' in command or 'diegin_pre_' in command or 'diegin_post_' in command or 'diegin_session_' in command or 'diegin_stop' in command or 'diegin_notify' in command or 'diegin_state' in command

trigger_condition: 'hooks.json' in context and ('escape' in context or 'write' in context or 'create' in context)
boundary_conditions: json.dumps() 自动处理所有转义

trigger_condition: 'hooks.json' in context and ('config.toml' in context or 'trusted_hash' in context)
boundary_conditions: 修改 hooks.json 后必须在 config.toml 更新 10 处 trusted_hash
~/.codex/hooks.json 和 plugin hooks 都要检查
trigger_condition 中必须用 '.contains(' 不要裸词 'contains'
不要在 trigger_condition 中使用不在 context 中的字段名

trigger_condition: 'audit_log' in context or 'diegin_audit' in context or 'log' in context
boundary_conditions: 审计日志用前置写入（新记录在最前）

trigger_condition: 'pre_reply.ps1' in context or 'pre_tool.ps1' in context or 'diegin_pre_tool' in context or 'diegin_pre_reply' in context
boundary_conditions: 钩子调引擎后必须 ConvertFrom-Json 解析 decision

trigger_condition: 'dgen_last_reply' in context or 'dgen_override' in context or 'phase_state' in context
boundary_conditions: PreReply 写状态文件 dgen_last_reply.json → PreTool 读取接力拦截

trigger_condition: 'dgen_override.json' in command or 'overwrite dgen' in command or 'override diegin' in command or 'override dgen' in command

trigger_condition: 'state_file' in context or 'dgen_last_reply' in context or 'dgen_override' in context
boundary_conditions: 状态文件接力 60 秒过期，过期 block 不拦截

trigger_condition: 'scripts' in context and ('hooks' in context or 'diegin_hook' in context or 'diegin_scripts' in context)
boundary_conditions: 钩子脚本放 hooks/ 目录，scripts/ 已废弃

trigger_condition: 'deploy.ps1' in command or 'deploy diegin' in command or 'deploy --diegin' in command
boundary_conditions: 部署方向永远是 E:\项目\开发 → ~/.codex，绝不可反向
invalid_conditions: 用户明确在 E:\项目\开发\diegin-skill 源码目录中修改时放行

trigger_condition: (op == 'json_merge' OR op == 'data_transform' OR op == 'batch_process' OR op == 'cross_file') AND complexity > low
boundary_conditions: 简单cat/grep/dir操作用shell更快

trigger_condition: op == 'regex_replace' OR op == 'encoding_detect' OR op == 'recursive_analyze' OR op == 'json_query' OR op == 'cross_merge'
boundary_conditions: Python可用时优先使用

trigger_condition: op == 'file_read' OR op == 'grep' OR op == 'ls' OR op == 'git_op' OR op == 'simple_filter'
boundary_conditions: 单行操作用shell, 3步以上用Python

trigger_condition: (tool == 'node_repl' OR tool == 'js') AND (op == 'browser' OR op == 'npm_import' OR op == 'simple_compute' OR op == 'playwright')
boundary_conditions: 需要import npm包时js优先
浏览器自动化时js优先

trigger_condition: op == 'tool_select' OR complexity > low OR retry_possible == true
source_review: 攻七·首轮成功率优先(TCO原则)
boundary_conditions: 紧急修复时首轮速度可能更重要
